locations.name: 阿波火山
locations.summary: 阿波火山（他加祿語：Bundok Apo）是一座位于菲律宾棉兰老岛东南部的活火山，海拔2,954公尺，为菲律宾最高峰。达沃市位于其东北方30公里处。近百年未喷发，有硫磺矿，覆盖着热带硬木林。 主峰及周围已经开辟为阿波火山国家公园（面积80…

relations.subject: Rufous hornbill
relations.evidence: Reasons for decline include habitat destruction, hunting and poaching for the illegal pet trade
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Rufous hornbill

relations.subject: Rufous hornbill

relations.subject: Rufous hornbill
relations.evidence: This species has been classified as vulnerable. It is believed that the North Rufous Hornbill is more threatened as the National List of Threatened Terrestrial Fauna of the Philippines has classified it and Endangered while classifying the southern species or sub-species as Vulnerable. This species suffers from substantial hunting pressure and widespread loss of habitat as a result of logging and conversion to agriculture
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
